title: Diamond Scheduler
author: bstrana
description: Sports league scheduling app with a drag-and-drop calendar, playoff brackets, live score entry links, and iCal subscription feeds.

changelog.1.0.0: Initial Cloudron community release with embedded PocketBase and multi-tenant support.
changelog.1.0.1: Fix: add image URL and updateUrl to manifest so Cloudron update checks resolve correctly.
changelog.1.0.2: Fix: team logos now render (CSP allows https: images); schedule publishing now works (env var defaults guaranteed in start.sh).
changelog.1.0.3: Fix: run pocketbase migrate up explicitly in start.sh so collection creation errors surface in logs; improve publish error messages to include HTTP status and field details.
changelog.1.0.4: Fix: bake relative PocketBase URL (/_pb) into SPA at build time; eliminate runtime sed substitution that caused fetch() to throw status 0 when APP_DOMAIN was unset.
changelog.1.0.6: Fix: embed schedule source dropdown no longer requires a schedule to be loaded first; any published schedule can now be selected directly.
changelog.1.0.7: Fix: Load Published Schedule modal now fetches the schedule list on open instead of relying on the user menu load.
changelog.1.0.8: Fix: forward Keycloak JWT to PocketBase on every storage call (enables @request.auth.* collection rules); support Keycloak Organization Membership mapper for org_id claim; guard localStorage clear to only run when PocketBase schedule publishing is configured; fix loadPublishedScheduleById blocking legacy records with empty org_id.
changelog.1.0.9: Fix: extract org_id from organization attributes when 'Add organization attributes' is enabled on the Keycloak Organization Membership mapper; fix logout redirect to use registered /logged-out.html URI; prevent Not-authenticated crash and PocketBase 400 when Keycloak token is not yet available.
changelog.1.0.10: Refactor: remove app_id field and filter from all PocketBase queries and payloads; add migration 3 to drop app_id from existing installations (redundant on Cloudron where each app has its own database); fix invalid sort field 'updated' → 'created' in PocketBase list queries.
changelog.1.0.11: Fix: remove sort parameter from all PocketBase list queries (system fields 'created'/'updated' rejected by this PocketBase version); schedule list is now sorted alphabetically by name client-side.
changelog.1.0.12: Feat: new Team Games embed type — table of upcoming/recent games for a single team with fullscreen game card, share popover, and save-as-image; show org name from Keycloak in game card branding footer; fix tenant system (loadTenant token refresh, auto-provision free-plan tenant on first login).
changelog.1.0.13: Fix: config.env parser now handles spaces around '=' (e.g. VITE_PB_URL = /_pb) without 'command not found' error; add note that VITE_PB_URL is baked in at build time and need not be set.
changelog.1.0.14: Feat: enrich user menu with role badge, plan badge, org name, email, and league/team usage counters.
changelog.1.0.15: Fix: React error #31 on user menu open (wrong TenantLimits field names limits.maxLeagues/maxTeams → limits.leagues/teams).
changelog.1.0.16: Fix: React error #31 — add strict typeof guards on all Keycloak token claim extractions so no object can leak into JSX rendering.
changelog.1.0.17: Fix: ICS calendar subscription returning 503 — VITE_PB_SCHEDULE_COLLECTION and related vars were not exported in start.sh so Node.js never received them.
changelog.1.0.18: Fix: org_id extracted correctly from Keycloak array attribute { org_id: ['test-org'] }; tenant auto-provisioned without Keycloak Organizations (falls back to userId); auth token diagnostic logging.
changelog.1.0.19: Simplify: use Keycloak organization alias directly as orgId — no custom attribute mapper needed; org name from organization.name field or alias.
changelog.1.0.20: Fix: check both realm and client roles for role badge; fix embed branding footer showing username instead of org name.
changelog.1.0.21: Fix: ICS calendar subscription now works — remove stale app_id filter from PocketBase query (app_id field was removed in v1.0.10).
changelog.1.0.22: Fix: inning half (top/bottom) derivation was inverted — odd filled slots now correctly show bottom half and even slots show top of next inning; inning number also corrected for the even-count case.
changelog.1.0.23: Feat: outs and runners on base in score entry (live only) — tap buttons for 0/1/2 outs and interactive SVG diamond to toggle runners; displayed as dots + mini diamond in GameBar live card and fullscreen overlay.
changelog.1.0.24: Feat: PocketBase real-time scoring — score edits and schedule changes now push instantly via SSE instead of polling every 60 s; 5-minute fallback poll retained for resilience.
changelog.1.0.25: Fix: base-runner diamond in GameBar now uses a fixed viewBox so bases are properly spaced apart; slightly larger rendered size in both card and fullscreen overlay.
changelog.1.0.26: Fix: SSE connection errors are now silent — graceful degradation to fallback polling (embed 15 s, admin 30 s) when realtime is unavailable; nginx HTTP/1.1 fix already in place for when SSE does work.
changelog.1.0.27: Fix: remove SSE subscription attempts from embed — browser-native EventSource MIME-type error cannot be suppressed from JS; embed now uses 15 s polling only.
changelog.1.0.28: Feat: stream overlay page (/stream-overlay.html?token=…) — compact live scoreboard for OBS browser source; transparent background by default; SSE real-time + 15 s fallback; 'Overlay' button added to Score Links manager.
changelog.1.0.29: Feat: redesign stream overlay — vertical away-on-top / home-on-bottom scorebug layout; per-team color gradient rows; team logo display; larger base diamond squares; compact right column for inning/outs/runners.
changelog.1.0.30: UX: score-edit auto-saves on state change (900 ms debounce) — Submit button removed; inline Saving/Saved/Error indicator shown instead.
changelog.1.0.31: Feat: balls & strikes in score entry (live only) and stream overlay; outs display reduced to 2 dots; base diamond bigger in overlay (bs=14); outs/runners removed from GameBar card and fullscreen views.
changelog.1.0.32: Refactor: remove autoSync option — all score edits now applied automatically; 'Sync Remote Scores' banner removed; autoSync field, toggle button, and isWithinAutoSyncWindow logic deleted.
changelog.1.0.33: UX: stream overlay split into 3 columns — teams/scores, status/inning/count (larger B·S digits), base diamond alone on the right.
changelog.1.0.34: Fix: base diamond SVG adjusted — viewBox -10 -10 80 80, rendered 110×100, 25×25 rects for larger and better-spaced bases.
changelog.1.0.35: Fix: stream overlay base diamond — move bases inward (second cy 4→16, third cx 4→16, first cx 56→44) to prevent corner clipping and reduce spacing.
changelog.1.0.36: Feat: game recap in score entry (textarea, auto-saved) and stream overlay (horizontal ticker scrolling from right to left at the bottom of the card).
changelog.1.0.37: Fix: stream overlay base diamond spacing (bases no longer overlap); ticker now clipped by card border-radius; score-edit base positions corrected.
changelog.1.0.38: UX: team rows now stretch to fill full card height; outs dots and balls·strikes digits enlarged in stream overlay.
changelog.1.0.39: Fix: bases closer together in stream overlay; ticker bar now hides correctly when recap is cleared.
changelog.1.0.40: UX: bigger team logos and names in overlay; tighter base diamond; ticker now uppercase and bold; inning half derivation fixed; score-edit inning table uses team abbreviations.
changelog.1.0.41: Fix: stream overlay now correctly shows top of 1st inning when game is live but no innings scored yet.
changelog.1.0.42: Fix: null innings preserved in save payload — overlay inning count no longer starts at top of 2nd due to blank rows being saved as 0.
changelog.1.0.43: Fix: overlay inning half now based on home score only — top half stays ▲ while away is scoring; ▼ only when home field has a value entered.
changelog.1.0.44: Feat: linescore toggle in score-edit — when enabled, overlay slides in inning-by-inning scores to the right of the base diamond; PocketBase migration adds linescore bool field.
changelog.1.0.45: Feat: H (hits) and E (errors) columns in score-edit inning table and linescore overlay panel; PocketBase migration adds hits_away/home and errors_away/home number fields.
changelog.1.0.46: Fix: linescore overlay panel width now scales with inning count — no longer clips at 8 innings.
changelog.1.0.47: Feat: single/double elimination bracket generator, pool stage + bracket format, exhibition/forfeit game statuses, schedule templates (save/load per league), TBD placeholder slots in playoff bracket view.
changelog.1.0.48: Fix: published schedule games no longer overwritten by auto-save; Feat: superadmin dashboard — system_admin role sees tenant management UI instead of the app, with plan/limits/active editing.
changelog.1.0.49: Fix: superadmin dashboard now authenticates PocketBase before loading tenant list — resolves ClientResponseError 400 on dashboard open.
changelog.1.0.50: Fix: remove sort parameter from listAllTenants API call — caused 404 on PocketBase; fix stable field back to boolean true in CloudronVersions.json.
changelog.1.0.51: Feat: Resolve Pool Bracket — after pool play completes, seed bracket games from pool standings with interleaved seeding so pool winners meet in the final.
changelog.1.0.52: Feat: Pool+Bracket — games per day setting for pool stage; bracket format toggle (Final Only vs Full Bracket); pool leader is home team in Final Only mode.
changelog.1.0.53: Feat: Pool bracket auto-resolves when all pool games are final — TBD slots replaced automatically; manual Seed button still available as override.
changelog.1.0.54: Feat: Playoff bracket view redesign — pool stage/bracket sections, live win counts, winner highlight with trophy, loser fade, forfeit support, short date format, status badges.
changelog.1.0.55: Fix: embed schedule widget (GameBar and others) now loads correctly in cross-origin iframes — CSP frame-ancestors and X-Frame-Options no longer block /embed.html on third-party sites.
changelog.1.0.56: Feat: multi-select league filter in embed code generator — pick any combination of leagues (or all) instead of only one; embed URL uses comma-separated league IDs; all embed types respect the selection.
changelog.1.0.57: Feat: standings sort selector — choose sort priority (W, GB, RS, RA, RD) or enable custom drag-and-drop row ordering; default sort can be pre-configured in embed code generator.
changelog.1.0.58: Feat: embed style templates — save named style presets in the browser and reload them via a dropdown; stored in localStorage, no backend required.
changelog.1.0.59: Feat: user menu lists all teams from the loaded schedule with color swatch, name and abbreviation; league builder now offers all schedule teams (not just global roster) when adding existing teams to a new league.
changelog.1.0.60: Fix: allow Google Fonts stylesheet and font files in CSP (style-src + font-src for fonts.googleapis.com and fonts.gstatic.com).
changelog.1.0.61: Feat: export loaded schedule as JSON from user menu; Fix: creating a new league no longer clears all games; sort games by date → time → game number in all views.
changelog.1.0.62: Fix: stream overlay now shows team scores for live games at 0-0 — hasScore condition now includes isLive so scores are always visible when status is live.
changelog.1.0.63: Feat: interleague games and combined standings — mark individual games or whole days as interleague; combined standings embed aggregates all interleague game results across leagues.
changelog.1.0.64: Fix: score-edit page now loads status from the existing score edit record (not the base game), preventing the auto-save from overwriting a final/live status on page reload.
changelog.1.0.65: Feat: score-edit confirmation dialog when marking game Final (with link-expiry notice); App auto-publishes schedule via score-edit subscription when a game is finalized.
changelog.1.0.66: Feat: H (hits) and E (errors) columns added to game edit modal score table; Game type extended with hits/errors fields; auto-publish merges hits/errors from score edits.
changelog.1.0.67: Fix: score-edit page no longer auto-saves on initialization (prevents overwriting final scores); live-sync poll now re-publishes the schedule when final score edits are detected, ensuring the public schedule stays up to date even if SSE missed the event.
changelog.1.0.68: Fix: 'Save as image' in game card fullscreen overlay now works for final games — remove allowTaint option so cross-origin team logos do not taint the canvas and silently block the download; use DOM-append click for reliable iframe download.
changelog.1.0.70: Feat: current pitcher field in score-edit page shown as static top bar in stream overlay; fix team filter dropdown scoped to selected league; remove redundant LIVE badge from stream overlay.
